keyTerms.digital twin: A continuously updated virtual replica of a physical factory, fed by thousands of real-time sensors
keyTerms.Siemens Amberg: Siemens's flagship electronics plant in Germany, a leading example of digital-twin deployment in manufacturing
keyTerms.predictive simulation: The capability of a digital twin to forecast future states — failure, bottlenecks, quality drift — before they occur
keyTerms.generative AI integration: The emerging fusion of digital twins with AI that can autonomously propose and simulate factory improvements
keyTerms.self-optimizing system: A factory that continuously monitors, simulates, and adjusts its own operations toward maximum efficiency
